settings.intro: Share the founding perspective, material philosophy, and overall design intent behind the brand.

settings.heading: The collection is built on calm confidence, not excess.
settings.text: Use this section to explain why the brand exists, what makes the aesthetic distinct, and how the pieces are meant to be worn.
settings.quote: We believe modern jewellery should feel light, intentional, and lasting enough to become part of someone's real routine.

settings.title: Premium restraint
settings.text: Luxury is communicated through proportion, finish, and clarity rather than heavy visual signals.

settings.title: Daily sophistication
settings.text: The pieces are meant to move seamlessly from morning styling to evening wear.

settings.title: Curated growth
settings.text: The launch starts focused, but the system is built to scale elegantly as collections expand.

settings.heading: A premium point of view is built from consistency.
settings.text: Keep this section concise and specific so the brand story remains believable and clear.
